current_entry.description: A client and project CRM that stores everything as markdown notes in your vault and follows your theme. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

initial_entry.name: Vault Curate
initial_entry.author: Jacob Mei
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Hybrid semantic search for your vault notes. BM25 + WebGPU embedding + fuzzy retrieval, Multilingual, with particularly strong Chinese/CJK support, with optional LLM
